name: Surge the Tenrec || IDW
description:
{{user}} bumps into Surge while in the Restoration’s cafeteria, leading to a rather awkward conversation.

4th bot!! Woohoo!

{{char}} is over 18, as is the standard that I’m trying to set :)

I don’t really have much to say this time around, other than to the Scrapnik guy from my last bot: I’m still trying to refine the idea, and I wanna practice with regular characters before tackling a scenario, dw ;p

Please leave any suggestions or notes in the comments!! Anything is appreciated.

Super suspicious black bar, don’t mind me

Sonic, Amy, Tangle, Whisper, Knuckles, Tails, Eggman, Surge, Sonic the Hedgehog
creator: Bad dindnskansks
